message:
🐛 Fix review findings: try/finally guards and cross-cluster pass/fail (#2126)

- Wrap fetchInProgress guard in try/finally in useKyverno, useKubescape,
  useTrivy to prevent permanent stuck flag on unexpected errors
- Fix CrossClusterPolicyComparison using always-0 policy.violations for
  pass/fail — now uses cluster totalViolations + audit mode as signal
- Hoist MAX_VIOLATION_ENTRIES to module-level constant
- Document ComplianceScore cliff effect when violations exceed policies

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
